SEARCH

Package com.nib.commons

package com.nib.commons
Common utilities and core runtime components for the NIB application framework.

This package provides the foundational infrastructure required for NIB applications, including:

  • Core program abstractions (e.g., AbstractProgram, Context)
  • Runtime environment configuration (e.g., Environment, Configuration)
  • Support for COBOL runtime integration
  • Embedded SQL handling
  • I/O operations and file handling
  • Storage and memory management
  • Logging and licensing utilities
  • Related Packages
    Package
    Description
    com.nib.commons.annotations
    Provides common annotations for the NIB framework.
    com.nib.commons.cobol
    Provides the interfaces for generic COBOL runtimes
    com.nib.commons.esql
    API classes for Embedded SQL (E/SQL) integration and runtime support.
    com.nib.commons.exceptions
    Contains exception classes used throughout the NIB Commons library.
    com.nib.commons.io
    Provides core Input/Output (I/O) components and abstractions for handling various file organizations and access methods.
    com.nib.commons.licensing
    Provides classes and interfaces for managing software licensing.
    com.nib.commons.log
    Sysout APIs Implementations.
    com.nib.commons.redis
    Shared resources API for REDIS
    com.nib.commons.shres
    Provides classes and interfaces for managing shared resources across application nodes.
    com.nib.commons.storage
    Provides components for managing memory storage and simulating mainframe-like data types.
    com.nib.commons.utils
    General purpose utility classes for common operations.
  • Class
    Description
    AbstractProgram
    The AbstractProgram class serves as a base class for defining procedural programs that interact with a runtime context, working storage, and system input/output.
    AbstractProgram.ISectionDelegate
    functional interface for SECTION delegates

    IEnvironment
